description: Fix real-time sync issues: reduce self-save window from 10s to 3s, add utangpiutang to subscription list, handle modal interference by deferring navigate when modal is open
steps: Step 1: In keuangan-firebase.js _kSubscribeCollection, reduce the self-save skip window from 10000ms to 3000ms.
Step 2: In keuangan-firebase.js startRealtimeSync(), add 'utangpiutang' to the collections list.

Step 3: In keuangan-firebase.js onCollectionUpdate callback, check if modal is open. If modal is open, set window._kDataUpdated = true and skip navigate. If no modal, call navigate(currentSection) as before.
Step 4: In keuangan-app.js closeModalDirect(), after closing modal, check window._kDataUpdated and if true, call navigate(currentSection) and reset the flag.
Step 5: In keuangan-app.js closeModal(), same deferred refresh logic.
acceptance_criteria: utangpiutang collection is subscribed for real-time updates
When a modal is open and an external update arrives, navigate is deferred until modal closes
After modal closes, if data was updated, navigate is called to refresh the view
node -c keuangan-firebase.js and node -c keuangan-app.js pass without errors
